calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing; Plaintiff Niantic Holdings, Llc?S Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiff?S Request For Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:24 a.m. and concluding at 9:50 a.m.

Plaintiff Niantic Holdings LLC appearing represented by Lauren Jones, Esq.
Defendant Jennifer Eggert not appearing.

OSCAR FAMOSO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff Niantic Holdings LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Amendment to Lease Agreement

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Niantic Holdings LLC, and against Defendant Jennifer Eggert, as follows:

1. Damages: $34,965.00
2. Attorney Fees: $11,093.00
3. Costs: $1,220.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $47,279.91

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing; Plaintiff Niantic Holdings, Llc?S Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiff?S Request For Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:46:44 a.m. and concluding at 10:53:19 a.m.

Plaintiff Niantic Holdings LLC appearing represented by Laura Campbell Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jennifer Eggert not appearing.

The Court finds that a statment of damages was not filed prior to the entery of default.

The Court ORDERS the matter continued to August 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., to give Plaintiff time to file a Statment of Damages and serve the same on the Defendant. (D505)
